ops.title: C4 base-model sweep deferred: only qwen3-8b serves locally in athome 0.7.0
ops.body: Decision 2026-07-17 (session orchestrator): the planned 4B/8B/9B watcher base-model sweep (~$50 gated) is DEFERRED, not run. Verified against installed athome 0.7.0: `BASE_MODELS` marks `qwen3.5-4b` AND `qwen3.5-9b` `serves_locally=False` (their LoRA cannot load into mlx-lm); only `qwen3-8b` can be trained, served, and scored by the served-MLX gate — and a base that cannot serve locally cannot be the production watcher at all, so a sweep has nothing to compare. What shipped instead: arm-parameterized sweep machinery (score_watcher pure observer + experiments/watcher-base-sweep.toml with arms filtered by serves_locally + StubDriver dry-run) that activates the moment athome ships a second servable base. The ~$2 unit-0 channel probe remains a gated orchestrator call; the $50 sweep budget is unspent. Unblock tracked in athome's ledger ("second servable watcher base").
